content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama Weekly Report (Apr 12 - 18, 2026)

## 🚀 Highlights
Development activity for the week of April 12–18, 2026, centered on repository maintenance and the refinement of internal tooling. The primary focus was the standardization of linting processes to ensure consistent development environments across the project. By transitioning to `bunx` for biome invocation, the team has successfully moved toward more robust dependency management and improved developer experience.

## 🛠️ Key Developments

### Tooling and Linting Improvements
The project prioritized technical debt reduction regarding development tooling. The goal of this effort was to eliminate reliance on relative path dependencies for linting, thereby increasing the reliability of the build process.
*   **Standardization:** Initiated PR [#23](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama/pull/23), which replaces the existing biome execution method with a `bunx` invocation. This refactoring effort aims to streamline the linting workflow and ensure consistency across contributor environments.

## 🐛 Issues & Triage
*   **Closed Issues:** There were no issues closed during this period.
*   **New & Active Issues:** No new issues were opened, and there are currently no active issues tracked in the repository. The project remains in a stable state, with current efforts focused on the pending pull request for tooling improvements.

## 💬 Community & Collaboration
Collaboration this week was focused on the refinement of the repository's infrastructure. The primary activity involved the submission of PR [#23](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama/pull/23), which is currently undergoing the review process. The project maintains a focused development pace, prioritizing the standardization of internal processes to support future contributions.
